notes: Bundled Node scripts (validate_owm.mjs, check_layout.mjs) were not callable directly (sandbox denied 'node'); a Python equivalent implementing the same three validator rules (coord range, endpoint existence, visibility hard rule) and the four layout-check rules (near-duplicate, boundary straddle, canvas clip, stage distribution) was executed and confirmed clean.

Three rounds of coordinate fixes were applied during drafting: (a) five visibility violations fixed (Deniability raised to 0.53 above proxy actors; three Awareness nodes placed above their Layers); (b) one near-duplicate pair fixed (Telecommunications vs Financial Rails); (c) three boundary straddles nudged (Deter, Economic Sovereignty, Friendly Fire).
Mermaid block constructed by hand following owm_to_mermaid.mjs conventions (double-quote all names, include 'size [1100, 800]', skip 'style wardley', preserve 'inertia' decorator in parentheses).
